local.description: Indicates whether this object represents a local or remote cluster.

specStatus.description: Indicates whether the desired specification is valid.

observedGeneration.description: Most recent generation observed for this RERC. Corresponds to the RERC's generation, which is updated by the API Server.

internalObservedSecretResourceVersion.description: Observed secret resource version. For internal use only.

apiFqdnUrl.description: URL of the cluster. Used for the Active-Active database URL.

dbFqdnSuffix.description: Database URL suffix. Used for the Active-Active database replication endpoint and replication endpoint SNI.

apiPort.description: Port number of the cluster's URL. Used for connectivity and synchronization.

recNamespace.description: Namespace of the REC that this RERC points to.

recName.description: Name of the REC that this RERC points to.

secretName.description: Name of the secret containing cluster credentials. Must use the following format: "redis-enterprise-<RERC name>".
